use_cases: Interactive onboarding checklist for welcoming new users to a product
Step-by-step setup wizard guiding users through initial configuration
Progress tracker showing completion status of onboarding tasks
Getting started guide with actionable items and checkable milestones
Onboarding flow designed to improve user activation and retention
ai_summary: An interactive onboarding checklist component with checkable items and progress tracking. Designed to guide new users through setup steps, improving activation rates and reducing time-to-value. Features clickable items, completion indicators, and typically includes motivational elements to encourage full onboarding completion.
